headline: Pick My Pet wins Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator
standfirst: Pick My Pet is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Pick My Pet and the award record

Pick My Pet is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Pick My Pet, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Sunday Times reports Pick My Pet Pvt. Ltd. was honoured at GBE Awards 2025 and says it launched in 2022. Official Instagram lists grooming, wellness spa, transport, clinical coordination, and daycare services. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator record matters

The Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator recognition places Pick My Pet in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, sundaytimes.lk, instagram.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Imported image is unrelated; use GBE branded media until verified recipient media is available. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Pick My Pet's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best Pet Boarding and Grooming Facilitator page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
